name: Service Stream Limited
analysis: SSM's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.6000. Trade idea: entry A$2.6800, stop A$2.4007, target A$3.5178 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
